source.scope: Official-source-backed Sweden calendar-year 2026 state and caller-confirmed municipal earned-income tax on final taxable bases.

SE.notes: Calendar-year 2026 20% state income tax above SEK 643,000 of taxable earned income plus caller-confirmed municipal income tax. Basic allowance, credits and ancillary fees remain outside scope.

register.coverageSummary: 2026 state and caller-confirmed municipal earned-income tax on final taxable bases.
